Cast: Ben Platt (Jamie Wellerstein), Rachel Zegler (Cathy Hiatt)
Master Notes: An amazing, Full show capture of this amazing Concert at Rachel Zegler’s favourite place! (London Palladium if you couldn’t tell)Light obstruction on the far left which misses a tiny but of action! Only To Be Sold/Traded As One (Both (1) and (2))

Cast: Ben Platt (Jamie Wellerstein), Rachel Zegler (Cathy Hiatt)
Master Notes: This was a…capture. More so a hail-mary capture if you would, definitely didn’t help since I was in a heavily obstructed seat. But, you know what. I surprisingly made it work! Only to be Traded/Sold As one! (Both [1] and [2])

Cast: Idina Menzel (Elphaba), Kristin Chenoweth (Glinda), Norbert Leo Butz (Fiyero), Joel Grey (The Wizard), Carole Shelley (Madame Morrible), Michelle Federer (Nessarose), Christopher Fitzgerald (Boq), William Youmans (Doctor Dillamond)

Filmed from the 4th row. Sometimes unfocuses from the action but there are great close-ups. No video of the flying scene, as the last 10 minutes of Act 1 are audio only. B
DVD circulates in multiple copies, the most common of which is 4.01 GB. These, however, have intense generation loss. The first generation DVD is 3.91 GB, and this is where the screenshots below come from.
